description: Digitize an archaeological section drawing of 'Test Pit 4' in LibreCAD using meters as units. The drawing must include a 4m wide by 2m deep trench outline on a 'BOUNDARIES' layer and three soil layers (Topsoil, Clay, and Gravel) with interfaces defined by polylines or splines. Apply hatch patterns 'ANSI31' for Topsoil, 'ANSI37' for Clay, and 'AR-SAND' (or 'ANSI33') for Gravel, organized on layers 'HATCH-TOPSOIL', 'HATCH-CLAY', and 'HATCH-GRAVEL' respectively. Include text labels for each context on a 'TEXT' layer and save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/section_drawing.dxf.
